setup_task.sh script defines PHOTO_PATH and places the image there.
setup_task.sh creates this directory and export_result.sh searches it for the exported DICOM file.

privileged_info_summary: The clinical photograph is generated as a synthetic PIL image because the hardcoded Wikimedia Commons URL in setup_task.sh returns a 404 error. The image is saved to /home/ga/Desktop/clinical_photo.jpg. The task requires the agent to import this image into Weasis, assign the metadata (Patient Name: Smith^John, Patient ID: DERM001, Modality: XC), and export the resulting DICOM file to /home/ga/DICOM/exports. Both setup_task.sh and export_result.sh confirm these paths and expected metadata.
